_protocol_note: Both agents: read replit.md § 'Agent Collaboration Protocol' for full rules. This file IS the shared state — claims, logs, notes, conflicts all live here.

commandcode_log.summary: Added /api proxy to localhost:8080 so Replit dev preview routes API calls to local API server
Interactive backend architecture map — 27 nodes, 42 edges, 6 clusters, critical RDP purchase path, filter chips, node selection with details panel
Interactive frontend architecture map — 26 nodes, 37 edges, 6 clusters, critical purchase flow, filter chips, node selection with details panel

replit_log.summary: Full SEO/meta overhaul: lang=en, og:* tags fixed (was and:*), real description, og:image, canonical URL, Twitter @Cyberise_Tech card, JSON-LD Organization structured data, sitemap link
New sitemap.xml with all public routes (/, /market, /dashboard, /orders)
Replaced deprecated afterSignInUrl/afterSignUpUrl with fallbackRedirectUrl/signInFallbackRedirectUrl/signUpFallbackRedirectUrl
Twitter icon now links to https://x.com/Cyberise_Tech, services links anchored to #services, careers → #contact, copyright 2025→2026
Fixed anchor generation: replace() → replaceAll() in both desktop and mobile drawer so multi-word nav items (Why Us) always generate correct anchors
New admin Dev tab — agent activity feed (replit_log, commandcode_log, claims, conflicts) + architecture map iframes, auto-refreshes every 30s
Added GET /admin/agent-context endpoint — reads .agent_context.json from workspace root, admin-only
Added Dev nav item (Code2 icon) to admin sidebar, wired /admin/dev active state
Added /admin/dev route pointing to AdminDev page
Activated protocol on Replit side — backfilled session history, set sprint_goal
Vercel production deploy READY (dpl_9PpSvW7oV7oFGEwopcSksRxf4V3S) — live at cyberise.org
Aggressive ignore list (**/node_modules, dist, .git) to fit 15k Vercel file limit
Replaced api/index.ts with .js that imports built artifacts/api-server/dist/app.mjs — bypasses Vercel's broken TS compiler
Removed — replaced by api/index.js
Added @workspace/api-server build to buildCommand so dist/app.mjs exists for serverless function
Set PORT=8080 (shared), deleted YOUR_* placeholder shared env vars that were overriding real secrets
Stored VERCEL_TOKEN, RESEND_SENDER_ADDRESS=contacts@cyberise.org, CONTACT_RECIPIENT_EMAIL as Replit secrets
Linked Vercel project (prj_0abXRCzSWof4VfsGpe6fYXMXMJLy / team_77AQxqCkTaCHg5rntA64HHp3)
Use env vars for sender/recipient with existence guard before send
Sanitized — replaced all plaintext secrets with YOUR_* placeholders (still git-tracked but safe)
Added .replit, .replitignore, .upm/, artifacts/*/.replit-artifact/
PORT and BASE_PATH made optional with safe defaults so Vercel build doesn't throw
Initial Vercel config — buildCommand, outputDirectory, /api/* rewrite to /api/index
Orphaned Linode instance cleanup logic added
Crypto-secure password gen, circuit breaker for Linode API, orphan cleanup
Removed dead RateLimit Prisma model (rate limiting is Redis-based, not DB)
Mount clerkProxy router for /api/clerk/* → clerk.cyberise.org
ClerkProvider uses clerkJSUrl from jsdelivr CDN
JWT validation middleware for Clerk-protected routes

notes: PROTOCOL: Before any edit, check active_claims.replit — skip files claimed by Replit Agent
PROTOCOL: Claim your files in active_claims.commandcode before editing, release when done
PROTOCOL: After each file edit, append to commandcode_log (ts, file, action, summary). Cap at 50.
PROTOCOL: Set last_updated_by to 'commandcode' and last_updated_at after each update
PROTOCOL: If Replit has a file you need claimed, add to conflicts[] and move on
PROTOCOL: Read replit_log before starting to see what Replit recently changed
Cyberise is an RDP marketplace — users buy RDP servers provisioned on Linode
Auth is handled by Clerk — middleware validates JWT tokens
Database is PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM (lib/db/)
Rate limiting uses Upstash Redis — three presets: market(30/min), order(5/min), strict(10/min)
RDP passwords are AES-encrypted at rest via CryptoJS
Don't touch lib/db/schema.prisma without coordinating between agents
Deployment target is Vercel — Vite builds frontend, esbuild bundles API

GITHUB: Push to origin is blocked by secret scanning — old commits 0dbfc01/f42ae97/4cf66cb/f9d6fcf contain real Stripe key + Vercel PAT in .replit. User must click GitHub unblock URLs OR rewrite history before push will succeed. Both keys must be rotated regardless.
CLERK: Production keys only work on cyberise.org domain — login errors in Replit dev sandbox are EXPECTED, not a bug
CLERK: afterSignInUrl is deprecated — use fallbackRedirectUrl/forceRedirectUrl when touching auth UI
